description: List of communal expenses for the Maghrebi congregation of Cairo (ק׳׳ק מערבים), noting in the heading: "from the hand of ha-r[av] A[vraham(?)] Zaytūn". Dated [5]569 AM which is 1808/1809 CE. The list is very detailed with many names, such as: Yiṣḥaq Roṣo, Yahudo Pītro, Shaḥata Danon, Aṣlān Gvālī, Yosef Shtawī, Avraham Goren. Requires further examination.
tags: communal, late alms, 19th c, late prosopography
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
